faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth problem in my Morrisania apartment?
faqs.answer: Signs of clothes moth infestation include small holes in wool, silk, or cashmere clothing, silky webbing in closet corners, small beige larvae on fabrics, and adult moths fluttering around wardrobes. You may also notice damage to upholstered furniture, rugs, or stored blankets. Our technicians provide free inspections to confirm the presence of clothes moths.

faqs.question: What does clothes moth treatment cost in Morrisania?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control in Morrisania typically ranges from $550 to $5,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your apartment or home, and the number of treatments required. Minor infestations in single rooms cost less, while whole-home treatments for severe cases require more extensive service. We provide free estimates with transparent pricing.

faqs.question: How long does clothes moth treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Initial treatments show results within days, but complete elimination typically requires 2-4 weeks and may involve follow-up visits to target newly hatched larvae. Clothes moths have a life cycle that requires strategic timing of treatments. Our technicians will create a customized treatment plan and schedule to ensure all life stages are eliminated from your Morrisania property.

faqs.question: Can I prevent clothes moths from returning after treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes! Regular vacuuming of closets and storage areas, proper cleaning of woolens before storage, using cedar blocks or lavender sachets, and storing off-season clothing in sealed containers all help prevent re-infestation. We provide detailed prevention guidance after treatment and offer maintenance plans for Morrisania residents to keep clothes moths away long-term.
